name: Microsoft Teams
description: Send messages and manage channels in Microsoft Teams
author: awaitstep

action.label: Action
action.description: The Microsoft Teams action to perform.

webhookUrl.label: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.description: Incoming webhook URL. Used by: Send Webhook Message.

teamId.label: Team ID
teamId.description: Team ID for Graph API actions. Used by: Send Channel Message, Reply to Message, List Channels.

channelId.label: Channel ID
channelId.description: Channel ID. Used by: Send Channel Message, Reply to Message.

messageId.label: Message ID
messageId.description: Message ID. Used by: Reply to Message.

text.label: Message Text
text.description: Message text/body. Used by: Send Webhook Message, Send Channel Message, Reply to Message.

accessToken.label: Access Token
accessToken.description: Microsoft Graph API access token. Used by: Send Channel Message, Reply to Message, List Channels.
